attributes.name: [RabbitMQ OTel] Queue with zero consumers and ready messages

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-rabbitmqreceiver.otel-default
| WHERE resource.attributes.rabbitmq.queue.name IS NOT NULL
// Aggregate ready messages and consumer count per queue
| STATS
    ready_count = MAX(metrics.rabbitmq.message.current) WHERE attributes.state == "ready",
    consumer_count = MAX(metrics.rabbitmq.consumer.count)
  BY resource.attributes.rabbitmq.queue.name,
     resource.attributes.rabbitmq.vhost.name,
     resource.attributes.rabbitmq.node.name
// Alert when queue has messages but no consumers
| WHERE ready_count > 0 AND COALESCE(consumer_count, TO_LONG(0)) == 0
| SORT ready_count DESC
| LIMIT 20
